analysis_plan_ref.anchor: §10.3 frozen endpoints, denominators, decision rule + §10.2 budget/kill ladder + §10.4 API-failure policy, AS AMENDED by the maintainer P7 ruling (kernel-of-truth issue #48, option 2, 2026-07-16; ASM-2501): straight to 10k, $500 cap HARD, $c=$0.05 ADVISORY (reported, never gating), P4a/P4b satisfied inline on the first real batch; Wilson z=1.96 operationalization per ASM-2500 (h floor ⟺ ≥134/200, selftested); verdict = pure function of the committed ledger export + blind review sheet through the pinned analysis script; latest ruling governs on conflict

arms_mandatory_baselines: frozen-numeric-floors comparator (production-instrument gate, not an arm-vs-arm study): α=0.70 Wilson-95%-LB (z=1.96), κ=0.70, h=0.60 Wilson-95%-LB (⟺ ≥134/200), evaluated against the §5.2 modelled envelope (Batch+cache ≈ $380; $/accepted ≈ $0.054 at α=0.70 — STIPULATED planning arithmetic ASM-2475/ASM-2492, never a premise, never quotable as measurement)

Law-2 standing nulls N/A HERE, binding DOWNSTREAM: the pilot licenses no end-task, correctness-thesis or efficiency-thesis claim (spec §10.5 honesty cap, restated verbatim in the envelope), so there is no claim for a kernel-as-text or shuffled-kernel null to oppose; ANY consumer experiment quoting ModelDrafted records must carry its own two nulls, and consumers requiring Explicated fail closed on ModelDrafted (ERR_STATUS_INELIGIBLE, P8 machinery, commit a4f65edd)

dependent_vars.definition: accepted / attempted per spec §10.3 pinned denominators: accepted = mechanically accepted within ≤3 calls (validateExplication + ERR_REF_OUTSIDE_CATALOG closure + encode-sanity + gloss/leakage lints, R=2 repairs); attempted = 10,000 − PROVIDER_FAILED; abstentions, malformed outputs and repair-exhausted quarantines are failures INSIDE the denominator. A legality/throughput rate — an UPPER BOUND on composite acceptance (g9 rule), never a truth claim.
dependent_vars.name: accept_rate

dependent_vars.definition: κ = cache-read input tokens / total input tokens over ALL Batch usage sums (input-only denominator; output never appears; Batch is the only transport, spec §6.0/ASM-2492).
dependent_vars.name: kappa_cache_read

dependent_vars.definition: ALL pilot API spend (micro-pilot + calibration + every failed/quarantined/repair call) ÷ accepted; $c=$0.05 ADVISORY per ASM-2501 — reported, never gating; human-review hours are reported alongside and excluded from $c (spec §4.3).
dependent_vars.name: cost_per_accepted_usd

dependent_vars.definition: blind 4-binary ALL-yes pass fraction on the n=200 seeded stratified sample of mechanically-accepted drafts; reviewer is maintainer-recruited, never the operator or any model seat; sampled passers may mint per spec §2.1 — the gate verdict never promotes unsampled records.
dependent_vars.name: human_pass_rate

dependent_vars.definition: PROVIDER_FAILED items (every call ended in provider/transport failure after ≤3 §10.4 retries) / 10,000; instrument bound 0.02 — above it the run is INVALID-RERUN, never graded.
dependent_vars.name: provider_failed_frac

dependent_vars.definition: settled total API spend from provider usage fields; ≤ $500.00 by the atomic pre-submit reservation invariant (spec §10.2); zero unreleased reservations at settlement.
dependent_vars.name: spend_total_usd

assumptions.claim: Design verbatim from the GO-TO-FREEZE spec (r5, 5 cross-vendor review rounds); register rows ASM-2466..2478 (spec r2/r3), ASM-2492 (Batch-only ruling + r5 tightenings), ASM-2496..2498 (mock build), ASM-2499..2502 (this freeze pass)
Frame values: 117,791 − 7,742 = 110,049 type-level synsets, frameSha256 777c000c…c033f3, measured 2026-07-16 on this box from the pinned WN31 shards (ASM-2493)
Maintainer P7 ruling encoded: $500 HARD, $c advisory, straight to 10k, P4a/P4b inline (issue #48 option 2; ASM-2501)

Operative sample = the adopted mock-build draw, pinned by sampleSha256 (ASM-2499); Wilson z=1.96 operationalization + planning expected rates as decidability inputs only (ASM-2500); analysis input contract + PASS-means-PROCEED semantics (ASM-2502)

GPT-5.6 volume accept-rate is UNMEASURED (ASM-2434, open; resolution_path = THIS pilot); the wilson_gate expected rates are planning inputs, never premises; the freeze-time PAUSE flag on ASM-2434 is expected and correct — the experiment IS the resolution path (guard conclusions, not experiments)
Mock mechanics green: 25/25 tests + e2e terminal balance 9,521+453+26 = 10,000 (out/e2e-report.json) — mechanics only, no rate claim

efficiency_relevant=false: the $c endpoint is a pipeline-authoring-cost gate (advisory), not an efficiency-thesis measurement on the metric vector V (m0b precedent for instrument/gate records); no outcome moves the correctness or efficiency synthesis verdicts

frame.fail_closed: worklist builder recomputes the frame from the pinned shards and refuses on count/hash mismatch (ERR_FRAME_HASH) or denylist hit (ERR_FROZEN_OVERLAP) — ASM-2474 contract, ASM-2493 MEASURED values
frame.predicate: no instanceHypernym axiom (the frozen f1k §2.1-step-2 / SOP-1 predicate)

human_sample.draw: seeded stratified (POS × polysemy band, proportional) single draw from the main run's mechanically-accepted drafts; draw script + seed pinned by ops amendment BEFORE the review unblinds
human_sample.instrument: blind 4-binary (same-sense · intension accurate · scholarly/self-contained · AST/prose consistent; ALL yes); reviewer sees label, drafted gloss, aligned WN gloss/synset, structural rendering — never coverage rank, benchmark items, model identity
human_sample.planning_load_hours: 40-75 h (reported alongside the verdict; excluded from $c)

micro_pilot.denominators: micro-pilot rows EXCLUDED from the 10k terminal counts (spec §5.3); micro-pilot spend INCLUDED in the $c numerator and the $500 cap
micro_pilot.endpoints: m1 measured P/S/O token distribution; m2 per-job Batch cache-read fraction + prefix-population behaviour; m3 Batch-cache composition — LAUNCH-BLOCKING: negative m3 ⇒ Batch-no-cache envelope ≈$705 > cap ⇒ no main-run launch without a maintainer amendment; m4 measured r at R=2; m5 accept-rate first look (NO gate authority at n=100)

n_planned.mock_green_requirement: $0 mock e2e GREEN 2026-07-16 (out/e2e-report.json sha256 5eca529ce2378d3926ea4bda890a8ee024e133e29dec84f2e7021b2ed65bd94e): terminal accounting 9,521+453+26=10,000, zero nonterminal rows, zero unsettled jobs, mock-settled $182.62 under cap, crash-adopt with zero duplicate submissions; MECHANICS-ONLY evidence — mock rates are NEVER quotable as expected real rates (ASM-2496)
n_planned.modelled_economics: Batch+cache ≈ $380 for 10k (incl. $15 micro-pilot + ≈$2.24 population allowance); $/accepted ≈ $0.054 at α=0.70; Batch-no-cache ≈ $705 exceeds the cap and aborts safely at the kill ladder — STIPULATED ASM-2475/ASM-2492 planning arithmetic, never a premise
n_planned.pinned_at_inputs: P2 P-9 placeholders, each completed by a LOGGED ops amendment BEFORE any main-run spend, NONE able to touch /pins/analysis_script, the endpoints, floors, kill ladder or budget: gen_settings (from the pinned candidate set at P3), measured P/S/O + the m3 outcome, cachePrefixHash (post-P2 exemplars), model snapshot id as sent, tokenizer artifact sha, account tier + batch queue, sweeper visibility-lag timeout, human-sample draw script + seed

P2_exemplars.state: PENDING pre-main-spend: 12 kernel-v0 candidates → full 4-binary human review → k≤8 passers sha-pinned INTO cachePrefixHash (g9 records BANNED as exemplars, spec §9.4); completes the cachePrefixHash placeholder

P5_crash_tests.state: GREEN (25/25: both SIGKILL crash windows, mid-pagination failure, unexhausted has_more cursor, same-membership jobKey collision, error-file routing, ERR_UNACCOUNTED_REQUEST guard)

P6_preflight.state: PENDING: live prices (incl. 1.25× cache write) + cache/Batch semantics re-verified; pinned tokenizer artifact; real model snapshot id; account tier + batch queue recorded; sweeper visibility-lag timeout pinned — ALL by ops amendment BEFORE first spend

P7_maintainer.state: DECIDED (kernel-of-truth issue #48, option 2, 2026-07-16; ASM-2501): straight to 10k; $500 cap HARD; $c=$0.05 ADVISORY for this one-time feasibility pilot

P8_family_disjointness.state: GREEN (committed a4f65edd; FD-1/FD-2/FD-5/FD-6 + ERR_STATUS_INELIGIBLE + authorFamily == resolve_family == 'openai' fail-path tests green)

price_table_pinned.reverify: P6 preflight re-verifies the live price table + cache/Batch semantics (ASM-0601 discipline); any discrepancy is an ops amendment BEFORE first spend; the $500 HARD cap is invariant regardless

sample.mechanics: seeded stratified draw over POS × polysemy band (mono / 2-5 / 6+), proportional with largest-remainder rounding — ASM-2498
sample.seed_operative: largekern10k-sample-mock-v1 — the mock-build single draw ADOPTED as the operative worklist at prereg-freeze (ASM-2499; spec §1 'seed registered at prereg-freeze'); a re-draw is a NEW experiment id

n_planned.transport: OpenAI Batch API ONLY (spec §6.0, ASM-2492): ≤4,000 requests/job, draft wave + ≤2 repair waves; jobKey folds (wave, attempt, sorted member keys) — ASM-2497 byte convention; job-level transactional outbox committed BEFORE batches.create; exhaustive-pagination discovery sweeper, ERR_RECONCILE_UNVERIFIED fail-closed; custom_id is per-input-file correlation only

endpoints.test: EXACTLY ONE primary — the ASM-2434 unmeasured volume accept-rate, the quantity this pilot exists to measure: α = accepted/attempted, attempted = 10,000 − PROVIDER_FAILED (excluded and reported separately; abstentions, malformed outputs, repair-exhausted quarantines are failures INSIDE the denominator — spec §10.3). Wilson 95% lower bound, z=1.96 (ASM-2500); floor α=0.70; GATES PROCEED. The PROCEED conjunction lives at /analysis/proceed_gate = instrument gates AND endpoints 1, 2, 4 (the f1k structural pattern: single primary slot, co-gating endpoints). Mechanical accept-rate is a legality rate — an UPPER BOUND on composite acceptance (g9 rule), never a truth or quality claim.

κ = cache-read input tokens / total input tokens over ALL Batch usage sums (input-only denominator; Batch is the ONLY transport, spec §6.0/ASM-2492). Deterministic point value from the committed ledger export; floor κ=0.70; GATES PROCEED. A negative m3 at the micro-pilot blocks main-run launch BEFORE this endpoint exists (spec §5.2/§5.3), so a κ≈0 main run cannot occur by surprise.

$/accepted = ALL pilot API spend (micro-pilot + calibration + every failed/quarantined/repair call) ÷ accepted; point value from the ledger. $c = $0.05 is ADVISORY per the maintainer P7 ruling (issue #48 option 2; ASM-2501): a breach is reported at equal prominence via /analysis/cost_advisory_breach and NEVER gates PROCEED. The $500 total cap stays HARD (/gates/budget_within_cap; atomic pre-submit reservation, ERR_BUDGET_RESERVE fail-closed). Human-review hours reported alongside, excluded from $c (spec §4.3).

Blind 4-binary human review (same-sense · intension · scholarly · AST/prose consistent; ALL yes) on the n=200 seeded stratified sample of mechanically-accepted drafts; Wilson 95% LB (z=1.96), floor h=0.60 ⟺ observed ≥ 134/200 (ASM-2500, selftested); GATES PROCEED. EXPLICITLY N/A IN MOCK: the $0 mock cannot run the human leg (out/e2e-report.json endpoint 4 = null) and a missing/incomplete review sheet is INSTRUMENT-INVALID via /gates/human_review_present — the human leg is REQUIRED before any real PROCEED. Sampled passers may mint per spec §2.1; the gate verdict never promotes unsampled records.

Instrument bound (spec §10.3/§10.4): PROVIDER_FAILED items ≤ 2% of the worklist after ≤3 provider retries per request; >2%, or any kill-ladder abort, is INVALID-RERUN — verdict INSTRUMENT-INVALID via /gates/provider_failed_ok and /gates/kill_ladder_clean: no scientific verdict; a re-run requires a fresh registration and fresh cap.

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: This pilot prices drafting throughput + mechanical acceptance + sampled blind human quality of a PRODUCTION instrument: GPT-5.6-Sol drafting 10,000 singleton WordNet-3.1 synsets through the frozen Batch-only pipeline at the pinned price table and account tier, accepted only by the unchanged deterministic stack, landing as immutable ModelDrafted records. Spec §10.5 verbatim: 'The pilot prices drafting throughput + mechanical acceptance + sampled human quality on WordNet singletons at 10k. It is not a semantic-adequacy measurement of a drafted kernel (DeepNSM ≈ 24/100, wave-1), not a coverage or checkability claim, and its accept-rate is a legality/review rate, never a truth claim. Mechanical rate remains an UPPER BOUND on composite acceptance (g9 rule).' Results bind ONLY to: this worklist (frameSha256 777c000c…c033f3, sampleSha256 5b0a73fe…, ASM-2499), this model snapshot (pinned at P6), these prices, this pipeline at the pinned hashes, this box. NOTHING extends to other sources (Wiktionary/Wikidata/BabelNet), other volumes (100k/1M+ are a documented FUTURE track, NOT authorized here), other models or prices, or to any end-task, correctness-thesis, or efficiency-thesis claim — the pilot's $/accepted is a pipeline-economics number with an ADVISORY ceiling (issue #48 option 2), never an efficiency-thesis measurement on the metric vector V. PROCEED (verdict PASS) authorizes designing the 100k stage's prereg, never its spend, and stays PASS-PENDING-AUDIT until the cross-vendor auditor confirms. Coverage: this experiment measures no coverage and no coverage claim may quote it; the standing kernel coverage number remains m0b's 0.3542 at molecules-v0, corpus-indexed to the pinned TinyStories table, on one incomplete kernel instance, extrapolating to no other corpus. No scale language of any kind is licensed by this record (a single volume rung; scale_language_max = none). Drafting is not byte-reproducible (provider-documented); the record supports attestation + re-runnable mechanical acceptance only (spec §8).
hypotheses: LK10K-H1 (feasibility, falsifiable): GPT-5.6-Sol volume drafting through the frozen Batch-only pipeline on 10,000 singleton WN31 synsets achieves accept-rate Wilson-95%-LB ≥ 0.70 over attempted, Batch cache-read fraction κ ≥ 0.70, and blind human 4-binary pass Wilson-95%-LB ≥ 0.60 on the n=200 stratified sample, within the $500 HARD cap — measuring the registered open unknown ASM-2434 (volume accept-rate), never assuming it.

LK10K-H2 (economics, advisory): all-in API $/accepted lands near the modelled ≈$0.054 (STIPULATED ASM-2475/ASM-2492 planning arithmetic); $c=$0.05 is ADVISORY per the maintainer ruling (ASM-2501) — a breach is reported at equal prominence via /analysis/cost_advisory_breach and never gates PROCEED.
kill_criterion_verbatim: Spec §10.2 verbatim: 'Hard pilot API cap: $500.00, enforced by atomic pre-submit worst-case reservation, not by after-the-fact cost recording' — no provider submission without a committed reservation covering its worst case (ERR_BUDGET_RESERVE fails closed); 'Kill ladder: checkpoint at $50 (require: ≥ 500 concepts attempted, κ diagnostic ≥ 0.50, running accept-rate ≥ 0.40 — else abort INVALID-INSTRUMENT); checkpoint at $250 (require ≥ 45% of worklist attempted — else abort INVALID-INSTRUMENT); hard-abort at $500.' Micro-pilot sub-cap $15.00 inside the $500 cap. Spec §10.3 verbatim: 'Instrument failure — PROVIDER_FAILED items > 2% of the worklist, or a kill-ladder abort — → INVALID-RERUN: no scientific verdict; a re-run requires a fresh registration and fresh cap.' Spec §10.3 terminal-accounting invariant (PROCEED precondition #0): accepted + quarantined + provider_failed = 10,000 recomputed from the committed ledger export, zero nonterminal rows, zero unsettled jobs — any mismatch means the run is unfinished or the ledger is corrupt: no PROCEED. Mapping into this record: any kill-ladder abort, >2% PROVIDER_FAILED, terminal-accounting mismatch, spend over the HARD $500 cap or unreleased reservations, missing §10.6 precondition artifact (incl. the inline P4a/P4b artifacts per the issue #48 ruling), or a missing/incomplete blind human review sheet resolves INSTRUMENT-INVALID via the named /gates/* fields; any gating floor miss (α, κ, h) resolves FAIL (NO-GO/reassess, directives §4) — never a silent proceed. A negative m3 at the micro-pilot (Batch serves no cache reads) blocks main-run launch pending a maintainer amendment (spec §5.2/§5.3): an economics NO-GO before main spend, never an overspend.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

runner_constraints.api_key: provisioned by the maintainer at P6 preflight; none on this box at freeze (checked at A-F0, 2026-07-10); the $15 micro-pilot is the first permitted spend
runner_constraints.config_contract: the single final run record's config carries arm='gpt56-batch-draft'; NO 'seed' key (sample determinism rides the pinned seed string ASM-2499; provider drafting is attestation-only, not byte-reproducible); metrics are RAW COUNTS per ASM-2502
runner_constraints.identity_separation: designer freezes (writer-4 = designer-21, disclosed in ASM-2502); runner-1 operates; verdict-gen grades mechanically; the cross-vendor auditor confirms — run ≠ grade ≠ audit; a computed PASS is PASS-PENDING-AUDIT until confirmed
runner_constraints.infra: this box (2 shared cores, nice -n 10, foreground gates) for validation/ledger; OpenAI Batch API for drafting; store roots at data/kernel-v1-draft/

title: largekern-10k — WordNet-10k GPT-5.6-Sol volume-drafting pilot (Batch-only transport, validator-gated, immutable ModelDrafted tier): PROCEED gate on drafting throughput, mechanical acceptance, cache economics and sampled blind human quality, under the $500 HARD cap with the $c=$0.05 ceiling ADVISORY per the maintainer P7 ruling (issue #48, option 2). Freezes spec §10 verbatim; authorizes the 10k Batch run within the frozen caps; a PASS (=PROCEED) authorizes designing the 100k prereg, never its spend.
